semantic.role: CLI command handler for the 'info' command, acting as a thin adapter that orchestrates the execution of the info report engine.
responsibilities: Defines the interface for the info command's runtime options (root directory and arguments).
Invokes the info report engine (runInfoReport) with configuration derived from command-line arguments and the default runtime I/O.
Provides error handling, catching internal errors and mapping them to structured ArchSpine errors for consistent CLI output.
outOfScope: Executing the actual info report logic or data aggregation.
Directly accessing persistence or database layers.
Implementing any business logic beyond command orchestration.
invariants: Must remain a thin CLI adapter, delegating all pipeline logic to engines and services.
Must not absorb persistence or core business logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a clean CLI entrypoint for the info command that delegates to the engine layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Resolve lint errors and finalize pipeline fixes before v1.0, ensuring consistent error handling and thin CLI adapters.

English.role: CLI command handler for the 'info' command, acting as a thin adapter that orchestrates the execution of the info report engine.
responsibilities: Defines the interface for the info command's runtime options (root directory and arguments).
Invokes the info report engine (runInfoReport) with configuration derived from command-line arguments and the default runtime I/O.
Provides error handling, catching internal errors and mapping them to structured ArchSpine errors for consistent CLI output.
outOfScope: Executing the actual info report logic or data aggregation.
Directly accessing persistence or database layers.
Implementing any business logic beyond command orchestration.

Simplified Chinese.role: “info”命令的CLI处理程序，作为薄适配器，负责编排信息报告引擎的执行。
responsibilities: 定义info命令的运行时选项接口（根目录和参数）。
使用命令行参数和默认运行时I/O调用信息报告引擎（runInfoReport）。
提供错误处理，捕获内部错误并将其映射为结构化的ArchSpine错误，以实现一致的CLI输出。
outOfScope: 执行实际的信息报告逻辑或数据聚合。
直接访问持久化或数据库层。
实现超出命令编排范围的任何业务逻辑。
